mapper.select: SELECT id, config_key, config_value, update_time FROM xxl_job_system_config WHERE config_key LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') ORDER BY config_key ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xxl_job_system_config (config_key, config_value, update_time) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = VALUES(config_value), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
